hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf /|rm -rf /\*|rm -rf servers|rm -rf packages|rm -rf catalog|git push.*--force.*main|git push.*--force.*master|docker system prune -a -f)' && echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Dangerous command detected. This could cause irreversible damage."}' && exit 0 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)$' && echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Cannot write to sensitive file types (.env, .pem, .key)"}' && exit 0 || exit 0
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */servers/* ]] && [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.ts ]]; then echo '\n📝 Server modified: Run `bun run build single <serverId>` to test the build.'; fi

cd "$CLAUDE_WORKING_DIRECTORY" && if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$CHANGES" -gt 0 ]; then echo "\n📝 $CHANGES uncommitted change(s). Consider reviewing before ending session."; fi; fi
command -v osascript &>/dev/null && osascript -e 'display notification "$CLAUDE_NOTIFICATION" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
